title: Naanum Unnil Paadhi Lyrics Arima Nambi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Naanum Unnil Paadhi
Singer: Alma, Rita
Movie: Arima Nambi
Music : Sivamani

naanum unnil paadhi
neeyum ennil paadhi
onril onraai kalappom
indha ulaginai marapom
aasai vandhadhu iyarkai
aadai vanthathu seyarkai
yaagam yaagam kaama deva yaagam
yogam yogam poorva jenma yogam

acham vandhaal thodathe
aasai vanthaal vidathe
azhagellam unathaaga naan kodukiren

bramman ennai padaichan
kaamandathil eduthaan
maharaasi mugaraasi unai sokka vaikume

iravellam thoongamal
iravellam thoongamal
thavam irupen
yaar vandhu ketaalum
varam kodupen
aadaikku vidaikodu..
aasaikku vilaikodu..
en vaazhkai ennodu
yaarum illai ketpatharkku
sugam suthanthirame

pothathu pothathu
eyakathil naan inga thavipathenna
un ullam thaangamal thudipathenna
kattikkol ottikkol
kajiraho sirpam pol pasi thaagam theriyaamal
naam kalanthirukalam

naanum unnil paadhi
neeyum ennil paadhi
onril onraai kalappom
indha ulaginai marapom
aasai vandhadhu iyarkai
aadai vanthathu seyarkai
yaagam yaagam kaama deva yaagam
yogam yogam poorva jenma yogam

acham vandhaal thodathe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Naanum Unnil Paadhi expresses themes of love and connection, portraying the desire to be united with a loved one.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Arima Nambi, the song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, emphasizing their emotional bond.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Alma and Rita.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Naanum Unnil Paadhi was composed by Sivamani.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 5, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naanum Unnil Paadhi, the characters express their deep emotional connection and longing for one another. The song's soothing melody, composed by Sivamani, enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. It beautifully conveys the essence of love, where two souls yearn to be together. The heartfelt lyrics and harmonious vocals evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naanum Unnil Paadhi from the movie Arima Nambi is a captivating duet that beautifully blends the soothing vocals of Alma and Rita. With Sivamani's enchanting music, this song creates a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of love and connection through this melodious track that perfectly captures the essence of longing and togetherness.
stanzaMeanings: I am half in you, you are half in me. Together we will blend and forget this world. Desire has come in the form of nature, and the act of creation is a ritual. It is a ritual of love, a ritual of yoga, a yoga from past lives.
When fear comes, it doesn't leave. When desire comes, it doesn't go. I will give you all beauty as you are.
The creator made me, and in desire, he took you. He will place you in my heart.
I am half in you, you are half in me.
Without sleeping all night, I will endure. No matter who comes and asks, I will give blessings. I will give to the dance, I will give to the desire. In my life, I have no one, and it is a joy to ask.
In the common place, I am here. What is the use of my suffering if your heart cannot bear it? We will endure together like a sculpture, without knowing hunger or thirst.

I am half in you, you are half in me. Together we will blend and forget this world. Desire has come in the form of nature, and the act of creation is a ritual. It is a ritual of love, a ritual of yoga, a yoga from past lives.
When fear comes, it doesn't leave. When desire comes, it doesn't go. I will give you all beauty as you are.
The creator made me, and in desire, he took you. He will place you in my heart.
